betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The first step to processing §eRaw Bedrock Ore§r straight out of the ground is to run it through a §3Bedrock Ore Processor§r. This will split the raw ore into general types, with amounts depending on the location the ore was extracted and any effectiveness upgrades. These types are:

§eLight Metal§r - common metals including §6Iron/Copper§r

§eHeavy Metal§r - heavier metals including §6Tungsten/Lead§r

§eRare Earth§r - rare earth metals including §6Cobalt/Rare Earth§r

§eActinide§r - radioactive heavy metals including §6Uranium/Thorium§r

§eNon-Metal§r - non-metallic ores including §6Coal/Sulfur§r

§eCrystalline§r - crystals including §6Redstone/Cinnabar§r
